name: Deathtide
short_description: Conquer an apocalyptic world and wage war against legions of the undead, demons, and titanic bosses. Combine the powers of unique items and heroes to bring down entire armies to their knees.
detailed_description:
Join our Discord


About the Game

A Broken World

Embark on a journey across treacherous environments in a world teeming with the undead, demons, and bosses determined to annihilate you. Uncover lost pieces of lore during your adventures, survive brutal challenges, and become unstoppable. Not even entire armies will be able to bring you down.

Addictive Gameplay

Each Hero has an unique combat style and special abilities for you to master. With over 40 items, including Artifacts that grant active powers, Equipment that modifies your Hero and Consumables such as potions and scrolls, you'll discover surprising synergies by combining these powers, ensuring no two runs are ever the same.

Advanced Artificial Intelligence

Experience a fun and engaging combat system that challenges you with powerful Elite forces. These foes read the ever-changing battlefield and work as a team to bring you down.

Made with Care

We are a small team of two people dedicated to developing a game with the utmost care for our community. We always listen and answer your feedback to make Deathtide the best game it can be. We appreciate your interest and look forward to seeing you in the Steam forums and on our Discord server. This game would never exist without your support!
